transcript.text:
(Beef small intestines 1.5kg)
(Beef large intestines 1kg)
(Beef reed tripe 1kg)
(Total 3.5kg)
(20 servings)
(I cleaned out all the beef intestines...)
(It takes a year for me to finish that...) You're eating a whole year's supply
(Sanbuk-dong, Gunsan-si)
Hey, everyone
Today,
I'm in Sanbuk-dong, Gunsan
Pig intestines are famous around here
After intense research,
I suddenly got a craving for beef intestines... haha
So I was originally going to go for pig intestines,
but I ended up at a beef intestine joint instead

This is the most famous beef intestine place in Gunsan!
(All reviews are legit, paid out of their own pockets!) The reviews online said it's seriously good
(The legend of beef intestines... the GOAT) The reviews were on fire about how awesome it is
As someone whose favorite food is intestines,
I'm curious how good it actually is, so let's go try it
(Hanaro 10-gil, Iksan-si, Jeonbuk) This is "Sanbuk-dong DAR GU JI"
(The beef intestines mecca of Gunsan) Oh man, I'm already excited
(Entering the restaurant) Hello
- Hello! - You look even better in person!
- Thanks! - No, thank you for visiting
How many servings come on one plate?
About 9 to 10 servings
- Without the veggies? - Without the veggies
(Let's load it up!) Can I have 10 servings, please?
- Sure - Thanks
(The generous side dishes arrive fast!) Thanks

Steamed egg! That looks amazing
Let's dig in!
It doesn't feel like I'm scooping
It must be super soft
Ah, it's hot
Delicious
It's the moistest steamed egg ever
It also has a hint of scorched rice soup
It's really nutty and savory...!
(The intestines show up) It's already here? That was quick
- We do a little pre-grilling ahead of time - Thanks
(It's like a whole cow on the grill...)
I'll grill it up nice for you
That's exactly 10 pieces on the grill
1.5kg...!
It takes a bit of time to cook

When it heats up, the oil pops, so watch your face
Please tell us if you need an apron!
(Did I wander into an amusement park by mistake?) Feels like I'm at an amusement park... haha
I've been saying this the whole time
I ran this business for 12 years, right at this spot
(People waiting in line 2 hours before opening) There's usually a line from 3 PM
But you open at 5 PM!!
Everyone's still eager to dine at our place
Now the color's starting to change a bit
- Looks delicious - It's almost done
(In the meantime, she finished the steamed egg!) I just finished the steamed egg
It looks really tasty
(Super long)
(Cutting into bite-sized pieces)
- Can I eat now? - Yes
Thanks

Usually, you dip in soybean powder, right?
Our sauce is half ground soybean powder, half nuts
(They recommend dipping with chili on top) If you put a chili on top and dip, it's even better
I'll try it plain first!
This...
Honestly...
Of all the beef intestines I've tried,
this one definitely has the most fat inside, no doubt
The fat is packed tight inside the intestines,
(Stuffed in) like it's pressed to make it completely full
The skin's a little crispy on the outside, chewy inside
Just the perfect texture for a bite
Let me try their nut sauce
Check out the fat...
(Fat dripping down...) That's a lot
It's been a while since I had intestines

Feels like the oil is coating my insides
(The owner said it beats the steamed egg) He said the green onion kimchi is killer
How good can it be?
It goes perfectly with the intestines
I finished the whole intestines fast
(Trying their famous large intestines and reed tripe!) Time for the large intestines and reed tripe too!
(He's cooking the rest of the intestines) How is it?
It's so good!
How is there this much fat?
Did you stuff it in or what? Haha
Nowadays, a lot of places sell intestines with added fat
- Really? - Yes
(You mean places add the fat inside the intestines?) Is that a thing?
- I never thought about it - It's actually a thing
Lots of suppliers started delivering them that way
(Artificial fat has a gamey smell, unlike natural fat) But that gives a gamey taste and smell

- Interesting - Ours is
100% pure natural fat!
By the way, you look like someone...
Like Yang Sehyung...
(100% lookalike) Oh yeah!
- I hear that a lot - Even the voice...
(The staff agrees, he's a doppelgänger) People say it all the time
Ah, now I get why it felt familiar...
- How is it so tightly packed? - The intestines...
(The secret to packed fat: freshly slaughtered intestines) We only sell beef slaughtered that day
- Really? - Yes
(So this cow was alive a few hours ago?) Then this one is...
This comes from a cow slaughtered today
- So it was alive yesterday? - Of course, these were alive cows yesterday
Have you ever had bitter intestines?
I have! Some can be bitter!

That's because...
(Let me take a bite...) cows are living creatures
(Stressed cows taste bitter...) When they die, they get stressed
The intestines are basically the cow's digestive juices
- So this is the way to eat it - It's much better than chewing it off
(This is it) It's twice as good eating it whole
So delicious
Like he said, there's no bitterness at all
This beef intestine has the richest,
most flavorful fat I've ever tasted
- Thanks! - No, thank you
- This is for the viewers... - Oh, really?!
But thank you, haha
The outside's like fried batter
(They sprinkle secret powder during pre-grill) We sprinkle something before grilling
(The intestines get crispy) That's our secret kick,

so the outside crisps up
It's so good...
Eating it right off the grill,
the clumped oil blends with the meat,
making it juicy and tender
Eating it straight off the grill is the best
(The staff is ready to grill for you) All this staff are here ready to grill for us
- Oh, sorry (?)! - It's fine
Whenever I go out to eat...
(Today, the jinx (?) strikes again...!) not many customers would come that day
It's okay (?)
I'm fine if there aren't many today
This is incredible
Let's wrap it in perilla leaves
- (More please...) - More perilla leaves here, please!
(This is called true happiness...) It's seriously delicious

What is this?
- That's lettuce, please mix it up - Oh, lettuce salad
Let me try it with this
(It's hot but delicious...)
(Should I add some potatoes?)
(Nods nonstop) Yes, please!
(Human lottery winner) I feel like I hit the jackpot
You definitely deserve it!!!
(Said by a regular customer) This place is legit
- Are you a regular here? - Yeah
She ate 10 servings...?
I can't believe my eyes
It's an honor to grill for someone this amazing
- Not at all, haha - When I got the call, I was shocked
From tomorrow, you should be celebrating
in front of your restaurant

(Intestines done grilling) If you need anything, please just call me
(Refilling the steamed egg twice) One more steamed egg, please
(As evening falls, customers pour in!) Customers just started flooding in
They're coming in groups
The first reason why it's delicious:
The chewiness is spot on
And because there's so much fat,
it's peeking out like this
(Like fried fat) Due to that coated layer, it tastes fried
Even the potatoes
are coated with fried fat, so it's delicious
Kimchi with intestines!
Should I add a bit of this sauce?
How did you eat all this alone? Amazing...
But don't most people eat this much?
Usually, solo diners

eat 2 to 4 servings
(Record holder) A couple came here once
Without any alcohol,
(Maximum 30 servings of intestines...) they had about 30 servings of intestines
That's amazing...
If I battled the two...
I'd lose
No way!!!
(The record everyone knows...) I eat 40 to 50 servings of intestines...
But now I am craving large intestines!
Something greasy!!!
I must be nuts for greasy food now!
Beef intestines alone don't cut it...
I want large intestines, the greasy stuff...
How many servings of large intestines can you grill?
1 row, 2 rows, 3, 4, 5...

I'll start with 5 servings of large intestines, thanks
(Large intestines arrive) They came out quickly
- We don't pre-grill large intestines - Thanks
- So it takes a bit to cook - Okay
- If you just wait, I'll grill it perfectly for you - Thanks
Look at us...
We just finished 7 servings...
(It takes a year for me to finish that...) You're eating a whole year's supply
Oh, I'm eating your whole year's supply by myself...
(Greasy large intestines) Can you eat this without any alcohol...?
(Beef intestines are my go-to...) I love this so much, I eat it as my main dish, not a side
- (Thumbs up) You're amazing - Thanks
Usually, large intestines taste better over charcoal
But... if you try ours,
you'll think differently
(While the large intestines grill, her mouth keeps chewing)

See that oil dripping down?
It's like an oil waterfall right now
- When the oil pools up, we need to replace it - Ah, okay, please take it slow
How many servings is this?
(5 pieces of large intestines...) 5 pieces
- 1kg of large intestines! - 1kg
Where are you eating after this?
(Big spoiler for the next video)
- There's a spot selling spicy japchae and japtang - Oh, at the market?
The market lady?
- That place is awesome!!! - Really?
(Excited about the popular market lady, coming soon...!) I hit the market to just eat at that place!
Oh, really?
(The sauce makes them char a little on the grill) Because of the sauce, it burns a little like this
The base is soy sauce
So it might smell a bit like pork ribs

(The owner's tip) Dip in soy sauce and top it off with chili!
The slight burn is not a burnt taste,
but a deep smoky flavor,
which cuts through the greasiness
(Tastes like Japanese-style large intestine rice bowl) You know the sauces in a Japanese-style intestine rice bowl?
It's like eating that warm, which makes it so flavorful
If intestines coat your throat with grease,
large intestines feel more like...
(Fully greased inside!) I'm coating my insides with grease from here to down there
Ah, I'm so happy
The soy sauce is so good
(It's so delicious...!)
(Kimchi grilling all golden)
The oil coating is just perfect
I'm so happy
Thanks

People worry about my health
when I eat small and large intestines...
They say that my arteries will get clogged...
But I should eat them when I'm healthy
(Can't forget the reed tripe...) I have to order reed tripe
- Excuse me - Yes?
(How many servings of reed tripe can you grill?) How many can you grill?
Since reed tripe is square-shaped...
maybe about 5 servings?
Okay, I'll have all that!
Since it's fresh, uncooked reed tripe, it takes a bit longer to cook
We'll grill it perfectly for you again
- One more steamed egg, please - Please bring one more steamed egg
He's sitting here super amazed...
I thought mukbangs were all edited out...
I'm really surprised...!

(Oh no, that would cause so much trouble) That cannot happen, haha
(The reed tripe's fat is removed perfectly!) The fat is usually stacked up here
- You take all that off? - Yes, we remove all the fat
So this is protein, right?
- Right, you can think of it as protein!!! - Exactly!!!
(I'm starting to be convinced...) Here it says "The Benefits of Reed Tripe"
It's from the traditional medicine book, Donguibogam
I'd better eat all this healthy reed tripe all by myself
Looks like you serve more here than anywhere else!
Yes, we serve it based on weight
(To be honest...) But we served a bit more just for you
About one more serving...?
(Since intestines shrink when cooked, they add a bit more) Since the intestines shrink when grilled,
we try to serve a bit more to the customers
Why do you press down the reed tripe?
If some oil drains out,

it gets a bit chewier
Honestly, it's been a while since I grilled 5 servings of just reed tripe...
Is this a lot?
For a woman eating alone,
it's really a lot
Do men eat this much too?
No
But women
like intestines more than men
- Oh really, they prefer it more? - Yeah, women prefer it way more
Try a small piece
- This small one? - Yes
It's tiny
Right now, the crispiness outside is...
almost like Peking duck
Seriously

For real...
I'm serious x2
Try picking it up with your chopsticks!!!
I'm serious x3
It's like Peking duck!!
I swear, it's like Peking duck
Wow, so good
It's really good
You have to eat the reed tripe for sure
I think only you can nail this texture
That's right
Tzuyang, you should feel honored
- The staff grill well too - Right, they do
(Gunsan left me with great memories, I'll be back...) Next time you get a chance,
- come back to Gunsan, where you made great memories - Sounds good
There are so many delicious food in Gunsan

That's why franchises don't stand a chance here
- It's tender, right? - This is good too
Oh, really? That's great
- I think you can start eating - Sounds great
- It'll cook a bit more with the residual heat - Okay
Some pieces are soft, some a bit crispy
Tastes like there's almost no oil left
The texture isn't tough!
It's chewy, really chewy!
Like it bounces off your teeth
She's eating alone but so much!
(Have a safe trip back home) Good luck to me!
(Thanks for the awesome time in Gunsan!) Thanks
I'll cut this finely and throw it in fried rice
(Prepping the reed tripe for fried rice...)
(Fried rice for one, but looks like two servings!) This is one serving of rice

My mom told me not to be stingy with rice
The scorched rice is perfectly crispy now
Amazing
So good
It's been just under 3 hours since I started eating
I should wrap up here
I'm eating way too long
(Time to finish the fried rice...)
(Finishing the last potato...)
(ALL CLEAR!!!)
She eats so well...
After this meal...
do you have desserts?
(Now heading to dinner!)
I originally planned to eat
pig intestines in Gunsan,

but ended up having beef intestines
and it was so good
The fried rice at the end too!
(The intestines smelled fresh with no gamey smell) Since it was slaughtered today, there's no unpleasant smell
Freshness was spot on, so delicious
The meat itself was fresh and nice
I ate really well
Once again, I enjoyed today's meal!
(Once again, I enjoyed today's meal)
